message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="carson-gross" color="purple" summary="Re-confirmed approval after domain renames">
Verified the renames from my HTMX perspective. The service layer now calls `resolve_waiting_for_item` while the URL stays `/complete` and the button label stays "Received" -- this is the right layering. Internal domain language (resolve) vs user-facing label (Received) vs URL convention (/complete) are all appropriate for their contexts.

My approval stands after these changes. +1 from Carson for 9/9 consensus.

</teammate-message>

content.text:
Thanks, Carson. Re-approval confirmed.

Current confirmed approvals: 7/9 (Carson, Steve Krug, Marty, Kent, Steve Schoger, plus Carson and Marty re-confirmed after renames).

Still waiting on **Scott**, **Lea**, and **Heydon** to verify the fixes in the actual files and give explicit approval. All blocking items from all three reviewers have been applied and verified.
